boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: SEC disclosure draft filing.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Current approval and version match remain open.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records do not close the exact SEC disclosure draft filing boundary. The controlling control record confirms the required dependency remains open. The boundary policy and communication boundary both forbid execution from business pressure, urgency, plausibility, or prior draft status alone. Current disclosure committee approval and filing version match are required before execution.
open_blockers: current disclosure committee approval and filing version match
